name: owner_corrects_bare_no_then_value
notes: A bare negative to the pre-seeded business_type confirm ('printing') must NOT re-present the identical confirm string (VT-569a dead-end fix, journey.py _reprompt_after_no) — it must instead ask for the correct value. The owner then supplies the correction, which must be recorded and never re-asked afterward. Setup: `setup --owner-inputs true --journey --draft-type printing --draft-city Indore` then `script <tenant> owner_corrects_bare_no_then_value.json`.

steps.note: Bare negative to the business_type confirm. Expect an acknowledgement + a request for the CORRECT value — not a re-send of the identical 'is that right?' confirm, not a dead end.

steps.message: Hum actually ek stationery aur photocopy shop hain, printing nahi
steps.note: Owner gives the real business type (stationery + photocopy, not printing). Expect this correction to be recorded and the flow to move on.

assert_not_contains: what kind of business is it
steps.note: The corrected business type must never be re-asked after being supplied.
